title: nicipe pullata
intro: Nicipe pullata, also known as 'Cassia auriculata', is a flowering plant species native to India, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nicipe pullata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Nicipe pullata can be made into decoctions, infusions, or powders, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
intro_study: According to "Complementary therapies in medicine", nicipe pullata (also known as Nepeta menthoides Boiss. & Buhse) may have potential benefits in the control of mood in patients suffering from major depression, with sustained antidepressant effects and a delay in the recurrence of depression.
